verse_text: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me All the days of my life; And I will dwell in the house of the Lord to the end of my days.

links.context: My mother's house is symbolic of the "house of the Lord" ([[PSA.22:6]]). God's house has "many mansions" or dwellings ([[JOH.14:2]]), and these chambers are the intended home of all humanity. In the spiced wine we see in mystery the mixed wine consecrated in the Eucharist.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
